_comment: Pinned ENT Q1 2026 numbers. Locks Anthony's Performance vs goal at $453,168.40 / $1,000,000 (45.3%). Three deals were marked Not Paid in HubSpot/manually (Estée Lauder, Experian, CloudSoft), so commission is calculated on the Payment Received amount ($254,293.90) at the ENT 45.3% → 7% tier rate.

commission.eligibility_text: ENT policy: minimum 0% achievement (any positive revenue qualifies). Slab bands: 0–75.99% → 7%, 76–100% → 9%, 101–125% → 11%, 126%+ → 13%.

reps.name: Anthony Raymond
reps.note: ENT policy: 45.3% achievement lands in the 0–75.99% band → 7% commission. Base commission is calculated on Payment Received ($254,293.90), not booked revenue ($453,168.40), because three deals were Not Paid at the time of calculation (Estée Lauder $160,000, Experian $4,356, CloudSoft $34,518.50). Plus $5,130 in Q4 pending deals (Armstrong $2,801 + Chryselys $529 + Forvis Mazars $1,800), minus $875 refund clawback for the cancelled Cambrex Q4 deal = $22,055.57.

pending_commissions.deal_name: Armstrong World Industries — BDO USA, LLP — Partner Deal
pending_commissions.note: Q4 FY2025 deal paid in Q1 2026 — commission at Q4 rate (10%).
Q4 FY2025 remaining 25% payment received in Q1 — commission at Q4 rate (10%).
Q4 FY2025 additional payment received in Q1 2026 — commission at Q4 rate (10%): $18,000 × 10% = $1,800.

clawbacks.label: Cambrex — Dropbox to MS (refund / cancellation)
clawbacks.note: Q4 FY2025 Cambrex deal cancelled; $8,747 refunded. Commission previously paid at 10% Q4 rate is now clawed back: $8,747 × 10% = $875.

manager_incentive.calculation_note: Q1 base $17,800.57 (Payment Received $254,293.90 × 7% ENT slab) + Pending $5,130 (Armstrong $2,801 + Chryselys $529 + Forvis Mazars $1,800 — all Q4 deals at 10%) − Clawback $875 (Cambrex Q4 refund at 10%) = $22,055.57.
